notes: Wave 4 of STRATEGIC-INITIATIVES-SPEC: initiatives now age honestly, and the book's predictive record is scored. - The maturation fade. As an initiative's revenue starts appearing in filed statements the operating model prices it — so the same future must not be counted twice (the classic SOTP failure). Each initiative can carry a dated, sourced realized record (annual run-rate showing up in filings); the fade removes the realized fraction from the contribution, disclosed on the row ("30% of scale revenue realized in filings as of … — counted once, in the operating model"), with the pre-fade va
